title: HRC Sicherheitsdienste
description:
HRC Sicherheitsdienste is a family-owned security service provider with over 45 years of experi
ence, offering a wide range of security solutions including object protection, construction sit
e monitoring, reception services, and event security. They cater to various clients such as hos
pitals, supermarkets, and museums, ensuring tailored security packages to meet specific needs.

We will upload 24gb of corporate data soon. Employee information (German passports, IDs and so 
on), credit cards, payment details, financials, lots of agreements and contracts, confidential 
agreements and so on.
